findings.description: Source has 3 h2-level headings (using `---` adornment) but knowledge file has only 2 sections. The third h2 section '実装コードで見るトランザクション制御' is merged into s2 instead of being a separate section. While all content is present in s2, the section structure does not match the source document hierarchy.
findings.source_evidence: RST heading adornment order: `====` over+under = title, first `----` = h2, first `====` underline-only = h3. The three `---` headings are: (1) データベースコネクション名, (2) トランザクション名, (3) 実装コードで見るトランザクション制御. Section (3) contains the JdbcTransaction implementation code example and is an h2-level peer of sections (1) and (2).
